dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - April 24, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**Reds' Late Rally Stuns Tigers in Cincinnati**

In a thrilling back-and-forth game, the Cincinnati Reds came from behind to defeat the Detroit Tigers 9-8. Matt McLain led the charge with two home runs and four RBIs, while Spencer Torkelson and Kerry Carpenter also contributed for the Tigers. On the mound, Kyle Finnegan turned in a strong relief appearance, striking out four in 1.2 innings.

**Orioles Blast Red Sox in Baltimore**

The Baltimore Orioles exploded for 10 runs in a 10-3 victory over the Boston Red Sox. Adley Rutschman went 3-for-5 with two home runs and six RBIs, while Gunnar Henderson and Taylor Ward also had big days at the plate. On the mound, Brandon Young earned the win with 5.2 strong innings, striking out five.

**Guardians Outlast Blue Jays in Toronto**

The Cleveland Guardians held off a late rally to defeat the Toronto Blue Jays 8-6. Angel Martínez hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Andrés Giménez added a key double. On the mound, Tommy Nance struck out three in a scoreless inning of relief.

**Rockies Edge Mets in New York**

The Colorado Rockies edged the New York Mets 4-3 in a close game. Freddy Peralta struck out eight in 5.2 innings, but took the loss after Michael Lorenzen earned the win with a scoreless ninth. Brett Baty had two hits and two RBIs for the Mets.

**Rays Cruise Past Twins in Tampa**

The Tampa Bay Rays cruised to an 6-2 victory over the Minnesota Twins. Junior Caminero hit two home runs and drove in three runs, while Drew Rasmussen struck out six in six strong innings.

**Braves Outlast Phillies in Atlanta**

The Atlanta Braves defeated the Philadelphia Phillies 5-3 behind a strong outing from Grant Holmes. Trea Turner had a home run and two RBIs for the Phillies.

**Pirates Blank Brewers in Milwaukee**

The Pittsburgh Pirates blanked the Milwaukee Brewers 6-0 behind a strong outing from Paul Skenes. Konnor Griffin hit a home run and drove in three runs for the Pirates.

**Athletics Cruise Past Rangers in Texas**

The Oakland Athletics cruised to an 8-1 victory over the Texas Rangers. Carlos Cortes hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Luis Severino struck out five in 6.2 innings.

**Yankees Rout Astros in Houston**

The New York Yankees routed the Houston Astros 12-4 behind a strong outing from Will Warren. Jazz Chisholm Jr. hit a home run and drove in four runs for the Yankees.

**Mariners Edge Cardinals in St. Louis**

The Seattle Mariners edged the St. Louis Cardinals 3-2 behind a strong outing from George Kirby. Josh Naylor hit a home run for the Mariners.

**Cubs Outlast Dodgers in Los Angeles**

The Chicago Cubs outlasted the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-4 behind a strong outing from Ryan Rolison. Dansby Swanson hit a home run and drove in four runs for the Cubs.

**Marlins Rout Giants in San Francisco**

The Miami Marlins routed the San Francisco Giants 9-4 behind a strong outing from Sandy Alcantara. Liam Hicks hit a home run and drove in three runs for the Marlins.
